description_long: This house is a large, multi-structure residential property with a central circular driveway and several interconnected buildings. The main building features a dark, gabled roof and beige exterior walls, with multiple wings extending outward. The property is surrounded by a low wall and includes landscaped areas with trees and shrubs, as well as paved driveways and walkways. There are several visible garages and outbuildings, along with a prominent main entrance facing the circular drive. The windows are arranged in a mix of symmetrical and asymmetrical patterns, and the overall layout suggests a suburban or upscale urban neighborhood setting.
description: A spacious, multi-wing house with a central circular driveway, dark gabled roofs, beige walls, and landscaped grounds, featuring garages and a prominent main entrance.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the front of the house with the circular driveway, main entrance, and landscaped trees at the rear.
description_view_1: View 1 highlights the side of the house, showing the driveway extending to the left and more of the garage area.
description_view_2: View 2 presents the rear of the property, with visible garages, outbuildings, and a cluster of trees along the back wall.
description_view_3: View 3 displays the opposite side, revealing additional driveways, garages, and the side entrance, with less landscaping visible.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a prominent door, steps, and a covered porch facing the circular driveway
